figures.caption: Figure 1. Typical distinction between eigenstates in different parts of the spectrum. (a),(b) Density of states (DoS) as a function of rescaled energy for two parameter choices (columns), J1 = −0.4, 0.4, L = 12,∆ = 0.5. Normalized (c),(d) bipartite (half-chain) entanglement entropy [33, 35] SvN, and (e),(f) participation entropy [36, 37] Spart versus normalized eigenstate index mi/D. A strong suppression is visible in the low-energy sector.
